landing.badge: Built for freelancers, contractors and service providers
landing.subhead: ContratoFácil is the platform that takes the busywork out of running your business so you can focus on what matters: serving clients and growing.
landing.feature1Desc: Create, send and sign legally valid contracts in minutes. Ready-made templates for recurring services.
landing.feature2Desc: Generate automatic charges, track payments in real time and reduce missed payments.
landing.feature3Desc: Centralize history, contracts and payments for each client in a clean, simple dashboard.
landing.finalCtaDesc: Create your free account and start sending contracts and invoices today.
